headline: UPS Beats Q1 Estimates But Holds Outlook As Shares Drop 7.2%
summary: Earnings and revenue topped expectations, but unchanged guidance and margin pressure weighed on investor sentiment.

raw.headline: UPS Beats Q1 Estimates But Holds Outlook As Shares Drop 7.2%
raw.summary: Earnings and revenue topped expectations, but unchanged guidance and margin pressure weighed on investor sentiment.

headline: Why The Market Is Wrong About UPS Stock
summary: The most significant insight buried within the Q1 2026 earnings noise for United Parcel Service (UPS) is not the moderate revenue beat, but the clear evidence that the 'revenue quality' strategy is gaining traction. While headline domestic revenue contracted by 2.3 percent, revenue-per-piece rose by 6.5 percent. This divergence confirms that UPS is successfully extracting itself from low-margin contracts to prioritize high-yield shipments.

headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Waxhaw, North Carolina Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Waxhaw, NC to new owners, Anusha and Venkata Gorajala. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this PostalAnnex.

headline: US Rejects 15% Of Tariff Refund Claims As Companies Navigate New CAPE Portal
summary: Federal authorities have rejected 15% of tariff refund claims since the CAPE portal launched April 20, CBP says.

headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Promising Prospects
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.
